reviews.review_description: Tutorial doesn't work, the enemy always walks out of bounds. It needs a lot of work

developer_response.body:
We are sorry to hear that you encountered an issue during the tutorial :( 

In Mixed Reality (MR) experiences, boundary and tracking issues can occasionally occur due to the physical environment, independent of the application itself. To prevent enemies from walking out of bounds, please ensure the following:

Environmental Scan: Make sure your play area is well-lit and thoroughly scanned.

Static Environment: Try to keep furniture and objects in the same positions as they were during the initial scan, as moving them can confuse the spatial tracking.

If you have recalibrated your space and the problem persists, we would like to investigate this further. Please send a short video clip of the issue to info@mythboxgames.com. Our development team will review it immediately to provide you with the best possible solution.

Thank you for your feedback and your patience as we work to improve the experience.

reviews.review_description: It's like a time traveling metaverse. Even like Dark Matter the TV show. Another alternate reality...where a people from another place and time. Come to our time and place. To invade and attempt to take over. Like the climax to the last Indiana Jones movies. Where they time traveled and ended up in the wrong timeline. This would make a terrific show or movie. But playing this game is like putting you into a historical time traveling movie. But it brings it right into your world, home and literal backyard. With the Chosen series about Jesus and the Bible, bring so successful. You guys can definitely do something if that in mixed reality. Jesus loves you !

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome feedback! More content is on the way including a full VR mode Roman arena, just like you suggested! ⚔️🔥 Keep your sword ready, Gladiator!

reviews.review_description:
Gladiator Battle: Mixed Reality Fight drops you straight into the sandpit as a gladiator facing relentless waves of opponents, all while the crowd roars for blood. Survival means progression — earning upgrades like stronger swords, reinforced shields, and even legendary weapons such as the Gladius or Sica (fingers crossed for Excalibur down the line!).

The combat feels intense, especially when three enemies close in at once — definitely set a wide boundary to give yourself room to swing. The upgrade system adds a nice sense of growth, encouraging you to push a little further each round.

Still in early access, but with solid execution and huge potential. If you’ve ever wanted to channel your inner Russell Crowe in Gladiator 3, this is the game for you.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Gladiator Arena and for supporting us with your positive comment! ⚔️😊 We’re glad to hear that you enjoyed our game. More enemies and powerful new weapons are on the way, stay sharp and fight with honor, Gladiator! ⚔️🔥
